name: Sunol Water Temple
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission Sunol / environmental impact report : comments and responses
documents.creator: ESA (Firm),San Francisco Public Utilities Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 2006 Sunol/Niles dam-removal EIR responses find the Water Temple eligible for the National Register and weigh whether reduced inflows would harm its character-defining water flows.

documents.title: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission Sunol/Niles dam removal project : environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission,ESA (Firm)
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 2005 dam-removal EIR describes groundwater discharging through the Sunol Water Temple and cites 1962 and 1965 rehabilitation drawings for it.

documents.title: Americans with Disabilities Act transition plan
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Office of the Mayor
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1997 ADA transition plan lists the Sunol Water Temple among PUC facilities and notes it is closed to the public, with accessibility folded into its restoration project.

documents.title: San Francisco water and power : a history of the Municipal Water Department & Hetch Hetchy system
documents.creator: Hanson, Warren D,Kukula, Frank,Nelson, Christopher,Williams, Mary
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2005 municipal water history recounts the Spring Valley Water Company building the temple in 1910 to Willis Polk's design, its 1989 earthquake damage, and 2001 restoration.

documents.title: Agenda
documents.creator: Arts Commission of San Francisco. Visual Arts Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1983 Arts Commission agenda addresses use of art-enrichment funds to restore the murals at the Sunol Water Temple, an "icon for the Water Department."

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: Public Utilities Commission minutes record direction to restore the Sunol Water Temple as part of the Sunol Valley Resource Management Plan, though restoration was "not in the budget."

documents.title: Alameda Watershed management plan, Peninsula Watershed management plan : appendix C
documents.creator: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A watershed management plan describes the filter galleries converging at the Sunol Water Temple and the adjacent Sunol Pump Station.
